I hope this email finds you well. My name is Alex, and I am a junior majoring in biology with a focus on molecular biology. I have dedicated my studies to understanding cellular mechanisms and genetic regulation.

I am particularly drawn to your work on protein folding dynamics. This specific area aligns perfectly with my academic goals and future career aspirations. I would love to explore potential research opportunities within your esteemed lab.

Could we schedule a brief meeting to discuss how I might contribute? Please let me know if you are available next week. Thank you for considering my request, Professor Lee.
